```python
import pytest

def celsius_to_fahrenheit(c: float) -> float:
    return c * 9/5 + 32

class TestCelsiusToFahrenheit:

    def test_happy_path(self):
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(0) == 32
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(100) == 212
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(25) == 77
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(-40) == -40

    def test_edge_cases(self):
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(1) == 33.8
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(-1) == 30.2
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(0.0) == 32.0
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(-0.0) == 32.0
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(float('inf')) == float('inf')
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(float('-inf')) == float('-inf')
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(float('nan')) != float('nan') # NaN != NaN

    def test_large_values(self):
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(1000000) == 1800032.0
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(-1000000) == -1799968.0

    def test_small_values(self):
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(0.000001) == 32.0000018
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(-0.000001) == 31.9999982

    def test_decimal_values(self):
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(25.5) == 77.9
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(-10.5) == 13.1

    def test_zero_celsius(self):
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(0) == 32

    def test_negative_celsius(self):
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(-10) == 14

    def test_positive_celsius(self):
        assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(30) == 86
```
